title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: self-host LLMs (Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma…) with a single CLI or REST API; macOS/Linux/Windows.

title: ollama-python
summary: First-party async/sync Python client for the Ollama API; pip install ollama.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; npm install ollama.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration via langchain-community; swap OpenAI for local Ollama models in one line.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Full-featured ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama; Docker one-liner, dark/light themes, code highlighting.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; Maven Central artifact ollama4j.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal retrieval-augmented-generation template using Ollama + Chroma; Python notebook walkthrough.

title: ollama-copilots
summary: Community org collecting IDE extensions: VS Code, JetBrains, Vim/Neovim plugins that talk to Ollama.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-host a Discord bot powered by any Ollama model; slash commands, thread support.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for running Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Official Docker image and compose stacks (CPU & GPU) maintained by Ollama team.

title: ollama-cli-chat
summary: Rich-terminal chat client with markdown, history, and prompt templates; pip install ollama-cli-chat.

title: ollama-nim-sdk
summary: Pure-Nim SDK for Ollama; Nimble package ollama.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate ollama-rs with async client and strongly typed requests.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET 8 client for Ollama; NuGet package Ollama.

title: ollama-model-library
summary: Official registry of 70+ GGUF models with Modelfile recipes; pull by name e.g. llama3:8b.

title: ollama-reddit
summary: Active subreddit for announcements, troubleshooting, and showcase of Ollama projects.

title: ollama-hackernews-discussion
summary: Hacker News thread discussing Ollama v0.1.33 release with Apple Silicon optimizations.

title: ollama-youtube-introduction
summary: YouTube walkthrough: installing Ollama, pulling Llama 3, and building a RAG app in 15 min.

title: ollama-blog-announcing-v0.1.33
summary: Official blog post detailing multi-modal (LLaVA) support, ARM64 Windows builds, and new API endpoints.
